title: Olivia Dean Wins Big at Music Awards
summary: Olivia Dean is a singer from London who won three big prizes at the Mobo Awards. The awards celebrate black artists in music and entertainment. Olivia won for best album, best female act, and best song. She was very happy and thanked black feminists who inspire her. Other artists like Slick Rick and Pharrell Williams also won awards. The Mobo Awards had a special 30th anniversary show in Manchester. Olivia performed one of her songs at the event. This adds to her other awards like Brits and a Grammy earlier this year.

background_read: The Mobo Awards are a special event that honors black musicians and entertainers in the UK and around the world. They started 30 years ago to celebrate talent and diversity in music. Winning a Mobo Award is a big achievement for artists. Olivia Dean is a young singer who has become popular with her soulful songs. She has also won other awards like Brits and Grammys, which show she is very successful. The awards night includes performances and prizes for different categories like best album or best song.
Article_Structure: WHO: Olivia Dean and other artists like Slick Rick and Pharrell Williams
WHAT: They won awards at the Mobo Awards ceremony
WHY: To celebrate black talent in music and entertainment

perspectives.description: Olivia Dean's wins show how hard work and talent can lead to recognition in the music industry.
